title: Chronic Lymphocytic Leukemia with IGH:BCL3-Translocation is Characterized by a Homogenous and Distinct Genetic and Epigenetic Landscape
description_es: Este estudio caracteriza el paisaje genético y epigenético distintivo de la leucemia linfocítica crónica (CLL) con translocación IGH:BCL3, revelando un perfil homogéneo que diferencia estos casos de otras formas de CLL.
abstract: Chronic lymphocytic leukemia (CLL) with IGH:BCL3 translocation represents a distinct entity with unique clinical and biological features. This study comprehensively characterizes the genetic and epigenetic landscape of IGH:BCL3-positive CLL, revealing a homogenous pattern that distinguishes these cases from other CLL subtypes. Our findings have implications for risk stratification and targeted therapeutic approaches.

citations.apa: Drewes, C., López, C., Martinez-Manjón, J. E., Okeke, N., Jebaraj, B., Bens, S., Brändl, B., Dyer, M. J. S., Fischer, A., Glaser, S., Hillebrecht, S., & Siebert, R. (2026). Chronic Lymphocytic Leukemia with IGH:BCL3-Translocation is Characterized by a Homogenous and Distinct Genetic and Epigenetic Landscape. Blood.
citations.mla: Drewes, C., et al. "Chronic Lymphocytic Leukemia with IGH:BCL3-Translocation is Characterized by a Homogenous and Distinct Genetic and Epigenetic Landscape." Blood, 2026.
